roa.docketEntryComment: DA'S NON-OPP DEF'S PC1473,7 MOT SET ASIDE GUILTY PLEA & VACATE CONV FILED
DEFT'S PC1473,7 MOTION VACATE CONVICTION, P & A, DEC FILED

/CAL  DEFENSE MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE PLEA OF GUILTY AND VACATE THE PRIORUDGMENT AND CONVICTION PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 1473,7/X: FRANCISCOUGARTE, DEPUTY PUBLIC DEFENDER, APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT,/MO GRTD/CTORD: THE SENTENCE OF 05-25-16 IS VACATED/CTORD: THE DEFENDANT'S NOLO PLEA TOA VIOLATION OF HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11377(A) ENTERED 05-25-16, IS VACATED AND A NEW PLEA OF NOT GUILTY IS ENTERED/X: AT THIS TIME, THE PEOPLE'S MOTION TO FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT ADDING COUNT 6, A MISDEMEANOR VIOLATION OF PENAL CODE SECTION 32 IS GRANTED,/IRRC/FAWC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:6/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/TWS/CH2:CJ1D/CTS:1/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/CTORD: COLLECTION OF FINES AND FEES IS PERMANENTLY SUSPENDED/OBEY/ACCEP/DISM3/NUNCDAT:05-25-16/X: SEE WRITTEN ORDER,/
/TWS/CH5 ISS PROB 2 Y PJ 4D/CTS 4/IND/WS/SA2 680 PT, LOBOS AVE,, SF (PARKNG LOT)/VF2:150/PC/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/REMA/BE/
/CAL PRELIMINARY HEARING/AMEND 5/IRRC/TEXT DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CIZ RTS ENT PLEA(S) OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:5/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LDPX:02-11-16/987,2/BAIL:95,000/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
